commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a generic embedding-provider registry fallback to memory-search config resolution and a regression test for generic-only providers.

PR surface: Source +8, Tests +24. Total +32 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main's resolver misses generic-only providers while llama.cpp registers local through api.registerEmbeddingProvider. I did not run the installed-plugin in-session memory_search failure locally in this read-only review.
